description: Convert the human insulin GenBank record at ~/UGENE_Data/human_insulin_gene.gb into pipeline-ready formats within a new directory at ~/UGENE_Data/pipeline_assets/. Export the full-length nucleotide sequence to ~/UGENE_Data/pipeline_assets/insulin_reference.fasta and all annotations to ~/UGENE_Data/pipeline_assets/insulin_annotations.gff. Perform an in-silico translation of the CDS annotation to export the protein sequence to ~/UGENE_Data/pipeline_assets/insulin_protein.fasta. Create a manifest file at ~/UGENE_Data/pipeline_assets/manifest.txt documenting the Nucleotide Length, Protein Length, CDS Count, and Gene Count using those exact labels.
